60 Phase 7 & 8: Add Detail and Polish

Phase 7: Add Ear Candy

e Add small details that keep the listener engaged: vocal chops, small fills, one-shots, reverses, delay throws, percussion details, and automation moments.

e Use ear candy to support the song, not distract from it.

© Best placements: empty spaces, phrase endings, repeated sections, and final lifts.

| GB Student Rule: Ear candy is decoration, not the foundation.

8 | Phase 8: Add Ambience & Final Polish

e Add depth and atmosphere with pads, background textures, reverbs, delays, air, room tone, and subtle environmental layers.

e Ambience helps the track feel finished and gives it a believable sonic world.

e Use just enough space to enhance the song without washing it out.

| G Student Rule: Polish after the structure already works.

\\\ iB Remember tl Detail and ambience should make the song feel more alive, not more cluttered.
